mnemonics.title: CAP Theorem Remember
mnemonics.content: CAP: Choose Any Two - A distributed system can only guarantee two of Consistency, Availability, Partition Tolerance simultaneously.

mnemonics.title: MapReduce Phases
mnemonics.content: MSR: Map, Shuffle, Reduce - The three sequential phases of the MapReduce programming model.

mnemonics.title: Parallelism Types
mnemonics.content: DTP: Data, Task, Pipeline - The three main types of parallelism paradigms.
